/usr/bin/ar qc libmlx.a CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/compile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/device.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/dtype.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/graph_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/primitives.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/random.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/transforms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/linalg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/common/broadcasting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/common/compiled.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/common/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/rocm/worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/rocm/conv/conv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/rocm/gemms/rocblas_gemm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mlx.dir/mlx/backend/gpu/slicing.cpp.o mlx/CMakeFiles/mlx_version.dir/version.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libmlx.a
